title: How can I recover my account?

history.content: How can I recover my account?

How can I recover my account?Let me look into the RealXmarket documentation...

Using search_realxmarket_docs tool with query "recovering account"

**Documentation Results:**

* Account Recovery: If you're unable to access your account, please contact our support team at [support@realxmarket.com](mailto:support@realxmarket.com) for assistance. You can also try resetting your password by clicking on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.

**Response:**
{"name": "search_realxmarket_docs", "parameters": {"query": "recovering account"}}
